concepts.title: Data loading and preprocessing at scale
concepts.hook: Bottleneck for training; parallelization and prefetching matter.

concepts.title: Shuffling and batching strategies
concepts.hook: Shuffling for unbiased gradients; batch size affects learning dynamics.

concepts.title: Data normalization (z-score, min-max)
concepts.hook: Standardize features; impacts learning rate effectiveness.

concepts.title: Imbalanced data and oversampling/undersampling
concepts.hook: Class weights vs resampling; weighted loss more efficient.

concepts.title: Image augmentation pipelines (torchvision, albumentations)
concepts.hook: Online augmentation improves generalization; computational cost.

concepts.title: Loss curves and convergence diagnostics
concepts.hook: Training loss plateau suggests learning rate too low; loss spike suggests too high.

concepts.title: Gradient accumulation
concepts.hook: Simulate larger batches with memory constraints; effective batch size = gradient_steps * batch_size.

concepts.title: Mixed precision training (fp16, bfloat16)
concepts.hook: Reduce memory; maintain accuracy with loss scaling.

concepts.title: Checkpointing and recovery
concepts.hook: Save model state; resume from checkpoints; track best model.

concepts.title: Validation strategy and metric selection
concepts.hook: Validation frequency; which metric to monitor for early stopping.

concepts.title: Data parallelism (DDP)
concepts.hook: Replicate model across GPUs; each GPU processes different batch; synchronize gradients.

concepts.title: Gradient synchronization and all-reduce
concepts.hook: Ring all-reduce reduces communication overhead.

concepts.title: Tensor parallelism and model sharding
concepts.hook: Split model across devices; each device computes different parts of layers.

concepts.title: Pipeline parallelism and micro-batching
concepts.hook: Temporal pipeline; GPUs at different stages process different mini-batches.

concepts.title: Distributed sampling and epoch synchronization
concepts.hook: Ensure no data duplication across workers; synchronize epoch boundaries.

concepts.title: Grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization
concepts.hook: Grid: exhaustive but expensive; Random: baseline; Bayesian: sample-efficient.

concepts.title: Learning rate schedules (constant, step decay, cosine annealing, warm restarts)
concepts.hook: Cosine annealing and warm restarts outperform constant schedules.

concepts.title: Momentum and weight decay interaction
concepts.hook: Weight decay != L2 regularization in Adam; AdamW decouples them.

concepts.title: Batch size effects on generalization
concepts.hook: Larger batches: noisier gradients can improve generalization; but convergence plateaus.

concepts.title: Population-based training (PBT)
concepts.hook: Dynamically adjust hyperparameters during training; parallel population of trials.
